title: YTPMV: Gourmet Face
description:
mp3: http://www.mediafire.com/?t1qwjmdt5nw

It's not the best video I've made by any means, but I say it's neat.

I suppose an another title for this could be...
- CD-i Link Favors the Kirby Series

Props to Demanga for making "Wand of Gourmetlon." It certainly is done well enough to be a sequel to this :D
